---
title: "Lab 2 — Example Results"
subtitle: "Week 7 · {{< var quarter >}}"
page-layout: full
---

[← Back to Lab 2 overview](index.qmd)

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Working draft.** Example step-response figures from the three experiments (Base, FeedForward, Tuned), with the speed and yaw-rate channels side by side. Figures are exported from `step_response_metrics.m`.
:::

## Base

Lab preset configuration: ArduRover stock PID gains, FF off, rate limiters off, throttle baseline off. Establishes the un-tuned reference against which **FeedForward** and **Tuned** are compared.

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Speed step response — Base](images/base_speed.png)

_Observations — TBD (rise time, overshoot, SS error, control-effort behavior)._
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Yaw-rate step response — Base](images/base_yaw.png)

_Observations — TBD._
:::
::::

## FeedForward

Restored `ATC_SPEED_FF` and `ATC_STR_RAT_FF` to lab values; PID gains unchanged from **Base**.

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Speed step response — FeedForward](images/feedforward_speed.png)

_Observations — TBD._
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Yaw-rate step response — FeedForward](images/feedforward_yaw.png)

_Observations — TBD._
:::
::::

## Tuned

Adjusted `ATC_SPEED_P/I/D` and `ATC_STR_RAT_P/I/D` for best response; FF kept on.

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Speed step response — Tuned](images/tuned_speed.png)

_Observations — TBD._
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Yaw-rate step response — Tuned](images/tuned_yaw.png)

_Observations — TBD._
:::
::::

## Summary

_TBD — comparison table across the three experiments for both channels:_

| Experiment | Channel | Rise time (s) | Settling (s) | Overshoot (%) | SS error |
|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| Base        | Speed | _TBD_ | _TBD_ | _TBD_ | _TBD_ |
| Base        | Yaw   | _TBD_ | _TBD_ | _TBD_ | _TBD_ |
| FeedForward | Speed | _TBD_ | _TBD_ | _TBD_ | _TBD_ |
| FeedForward | Yaw   | _TBD_ | _TBD_ | _TBD_ | _TBD_ |
| Tuned       | Speed | _TBD_ | _TBD_ | _TBD_ | _TBD_ |
| Tuned       | Yaw   | _TBD_ | _TBD_ | _TBD_ | _TBD_ |
